chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1063 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Directions For hearing of CMA 7177/2023 22-02-2024 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahessar, Advocate for applicant/petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-SALU. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional A.G - Sindh. ***** This is a disposed of matter. Grievance of the petitioner has been mainly redressed. However, there is still issue of annual increments of four years. Learned counsel for respondents-university submits that syndicate of the university has already approved the case of the petitioner/applicant and within 15 days, amount would be reimbursed to him. Accordingly, listed application having served its purpose is disposed of. After compliance is made, such compliance report shall be filed for a perusal in chamber. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
